# Theorem: Boundary Effects Create Discontinuities

## Statement
If exposure is gated by score threshold \(T\):

\[
E_i=0 \text{ if } S_i<T, \quad E_i=E_0 \text{ if } S_i\ge T
\]

then any manipulation \(\delta\) satisfying \(S_i<T\) and \(S_i+\delta\ge T\) creates a discontinuous exposure jump of \(E_0\).

## Relevance
Trending pages, candidate generation, app charts, Product Hunt homepage ranks, and search top positions can have threshold-like effects.
